transcript: Speaker A: I Pooja, I Chennai, I doing hard working person. Speaker B: Naa peru Pooja, nenu Chennai nundi vachanu mariyu nenu kashtapadi panichese vyaktini. [My name is Pooja, I came from Chennai and I am a hardworking person.] Speaker A: My name is Pooja, I am from Chennai, I am a hardworking person. Speaker B: Very good. Speaker C: Hi, nenu ippude meeru English nerchukovadam chusanu. Actually naa English kuda chala weak, app nundi English nerchukovacha? [Hi, I just saw you learning English. Actually my English is also very weak, can I learn English from this app?] Speaker A: Naa English kuda weak ga undi, anduke daily nenu SpeakX app lo English practice chestunnanu. [My English is also weak, that's why I practice English daily on the SpeakX app.] Speaker C: SpeakX app-a, adenti? [SpeakX app, what is that?] Speaker A: Idi oka AI English teaching app. Ikkada AI teachers neeku English practice chepinchi English ela matladalo nerpistar. Adi kuda emi judge cheyakunda human teachers laga. [This is an AI English teaching app. Here AI teachers make you practice English and teach you how to speak English. That too without judging, like human teachers.] Speaker C: Kani deeni nerchukodaniki chala time padutundi kada? [But it takes a lot of time to learn this, right?] Speaker A: Ledu, roz ki 15-20 minutes ee app lo practice cheste chalu. 15 to 20 days lo meeru English fluent ga matladataru. Already naa friends andaru fluent aipoyaru, inka konni rojulalo nenu kuda fluent aipotanu. [No, practicing 15-20 minutes daily on this app is enough. In 15 to 20 days you will speak English fluently. Already all my friends became fluent, and in a few days I will also become fluent.] Speaker C: Kani idi chala costly untundi kada? [But this must be very costly, right?] Speaker A: Assalu kadu, rojuki 4 rupees matrame, 7 days trial kuda teeskovachu. [Not at all, only 4 rupees per day, you can also take a 7 days trial.] Speaker C: Idi naku munde enduku teliyaledu, nenu ippude SpeakX app download chestanu. Thank you. [Why didn't I know this before, I will download the SpeakX app right now. Thank you.]
on_screen_text: I Pooja | I Chennai | I doing hard working person. | Naa peru Pooja | nenu Chennai nundi vachanu | mariyu nenu kashtapadi | panichese vyaktini. | My name is Pooja, | I am from Chennai, | I am a hardworking person. | Very good. | Hi, | nenu ippude meeru English | nerchukovadam chusanu. | Actually naa English kuda chala weak, | app nundi English nerchukovacha? | Naa English kuda | weak ga undi, | anduke daily nenu | SpeakX app lo | English practice chestunnanu. | SpeakX app | idi oka AI English teaching app. | Ikkada AI teachers neeku English | Practice chepinchi | English ela matladalo nerpistaru. | Adi kuda | emi judge cheyakunda | human teachers laga. | Kani deeniki | chala time padutundi kada? | roz ke 15-20 minutes | ee app lo practice chey, | 15 to 20 days | lo meeru English | fluent ga matladataru. | Already naa friends | andaru fluent aipoyaru. | nenu kuda konni rojulalo | fluent aipotanu. | Kani idi chala costly | untundi kada? | Assalu kaadu | rojuki 4 rupees matrame, | 7 days trial kuda | theeskovachu. | Idi naku munde enduku | teliyaledu | nenu ippude SpeakX app | download chesthanu. | Thank you.
summary: A woman uses the SpeakX app to practice English with an AI avatar that corrects her grammar. A man in a cafe notices her and asks about the app due to his own weak English. She explains that the app offers non-judgmental AI tutoring for 15-20 minutes daily, costing only 4 rupees a day with a 7-day trial, leading him to download it.
